creator: yeti@gwyddion.net
text:
Regular update to a new backward compatible upstream version 2.5 with improvements and non-critical bug fixes.

I made certain significant changes to the port itself however:

- USE_X_PREFIX was removed so that it installs to LOCALBASE now (it was a mistake
  to use USE_X_PREFIX), I suppose it should be noted in UPDATING.

  AFAIK nothing depends on this port.

  As a side effect the Freedesktop stuff works properly now.

- The PERL_LEVEL < 500601 workaround was removed: 4.x is no longer supported so
  it should be redundant now

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: N.A.
